task_completion.description: FreeCAD application is open and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A 3D rectangular base shape is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid rectangular block is visible in the 3D view, or a 'Pad' or 'Box' feature is listed in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: The dimensions of the enclosure are set to 100 mm x 60 mm x 25 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values 100, 60, and 25 are visible in the Sketcher constraints, Pad parameters, Box properties, or a measurement tool.

task_completion.description: The enclosure is hollowed out with an open top and a 2 mm wall thickness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model shows a hollow box with an open top. A 'Thickness' or 'Shell' feature may be visible in the Model tree view, or a 2mm thickness value is visible in the property editor.

task_completion.description: The model is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'enclosure' or 'enclosure.FCStd', or a save dialog/file manager shows the file in the Documents/FreeCAD directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and the 3D view, rather than just terminal commands or python console scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with FreeCAD, not a text editor or a mock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD interface is clearly visible and being actively used to design the part.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch rather than downloading or copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step creation (sketching, padding, hollowing) is visible across the sequence of screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target enclosure must have outer dimensions of 100 mm x 60 mm x 25 mm and a uniform wall thickness of 2 mm. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/enclosure.FCStd. The expected shell volume is approximately 26,352 mm³.
